isi.lyrics:
Lyric K-Vin - Espresso

Romanization

You come to me in the quiet of dawn
No sugar smile, just bitterness on
You don’t pretend, you don’t disguise
But somehow, you open my eyes

Dark and deep, like a secret truth
You burn my tongue, but clear my youth
Every sip, a little sting
But oh, the peace your silence brings

You're my bitter friend, my morning light
You cut the dark, you make it right
You're my bitter friend, and that’s enough
No sweet facade, just honest love

You never laugh, you never cry
But you sit with me when tears are dry
In every cup, I find my place
A little warmth, a little grace

Dark and deep, like a secret truth
You burn my tongue, but clear my youth
Every sip, a little sting
But oh, the peace your silence brings

You're my bitter friend, my morning light
You cut the dark, you make it right
You're my bitter friend, and that’s enough
No sweet facade, just honest love

Maybe love's not always sweet
Sometimes truth is what we need
And in your steam, I see the proof
That bitterness can hold the truth

You're my bitter friend, my morning light
You cut the dark, you make it right
You're my bitter friend, and that’s enough
